# Canonical GitHub release asset contract for public Quaid releases.
# Keep this manifest aligned with scripts/install.sh, .github/workflows/release.yml,
# .github/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md, and release-asset parity tests.
# Single channel (qwen3-models-airgapped §5): one binary per platform that
# provisions its model on first use — no -airgapped/-online suffix.
quaid-darwin-arm64
quaid-darwin-arm64.sha256
quaid-darwin-x86_64
quaid-darwin-x86_64.sha256
quaid-linux-x86_64
quaid-linux-x86_64.sha256
quaid-linux-aarch64
quaid-linux-aarch64.sha256
install.sh
